description: Enjoy the winter in style this season with this grey muffler from scullers. Drape it over your t-shirts or knot it over your kurtas and enjoy that hot street food in the mist with much comfort. Made of a blended fabric Length: 186 cm Width: 22 cm Wash care Dry clean recommended Hand wash cold using a mild detergent Do not bleach, wring or tumble dry Dry flat in shade Cool iron
